RocketCDS Documentation

Welcome to the RocketCDS documentation.

Overview

RocketCDS is a powerful Content Management System (CMS) framework for DNN Platform, providing a flexible and extensible foundation for building dynamic web applications.

This documentation is not intended to be highly technical; rather, it focuses on the integration and functionality of RocketCDS and is not designed as an end-user guide. All RocketCDS modules have been developed to be as simple and intuitive to edit as possible, allowing users with basic computer skills to easily update and manage content.

Getting Started

  • Starter Tutorial - Install, Plug and Play in DNN
  • AppThemes - AppTheme are the key to using Rocket
  • Razor Tokens - Razor Tokens with AppThemes
  • Snippets - AppTheme example code

What It Is

  • DNNrocket Core - Core framework and API
  • Modules - Module documentation

Components

Core Framework

  • DNNrocket Core - The main API and framework
  • RocketTools - Development and utility tools
  • RocketUtils - Common utilities library
  • RocketPortal - Portal management functionality
  • RocketEndInstall - Installation and setup utilities
  • AppThemes - Theme management and templates
  • Simplisity - Simplification library

Modules

  • RocketBlog - Blog management module
  • RocketContent - Content management module
  • RocketDirectory - Directory listing module
  • RocketEvents - Event management module
  • RocketForms - Form builder module
  • RocketNews - News management module

Resources

  • GitHub Repository
